odeComponent.htmlView:
2

Hallar las palabras ocultas.

¡Buen trabajo!

Veo muy buenas estructuras en tu trabajo.

%E9%B0%E6%EB%E2%F7%D5%F3%FF%F7%B0%A8%B0%C1%FD%E2%F3%B0%BE%B0%FB%FC%E1%E6%E0%E7%F1%E6%FB%FD%FC%E1%B0%A8%B0%AE%E2%AC%DA%F3%FE%FE%F3%E0%B2%FE%F3%E1%B2%E2%F3%FE%F3%F0%E0%F3%E1%B2%FD%F1%E7%FE%E6%F3%E1%BC%AE%BD%E2%AC%B0%BE%B0%E1%FA%FD%E5%DF%FB%FC%FB%FF%FB%E8%F7%B0%A8%F4%F3%FE%E1%F7%BE%B0%FB%E6%FB%FC%F7%E0%F3%E0%EB%B0%A8%E9%B0%E1%FA%FD%E5%D1%FE%E7%F7%B0%A8%F4%F3%FE%E1%F7%BE%B0%F1%FE%E7%F7%D5%F3%FF%F7%B0%A8%B0%B0%BE%B0%E2%F7%E0%F1%F7%FC%E6%F3%F5%F7%D1%FE%E7%F7%B0%A8%A6%A2%BE%B0%E1%FA%FD%E5%D1%FD%F6%F7%D3%F1%F1%F7%E1%E1%B0%A8%F4%F3%FE%E1%F7%BE%B0%F1%FD%F6%F7%D3%F1%F1%F7%E1%E1%B0%A8%B0%B0%BE%B0%FF%F7%E1%E1%F3%F5%F7%D1%FD%F6%F7%D3%F1%F1%F7%E1%E1%B0%A8%B0%B0%EF%BE%B0%E5%FD%E0%F6%E1%D5%F3%FF%F7%B0%A8%C9%E9%B0%E5%FD%E0%F6%B0%A8%B0%DF%F3%F1%FB%E8%F3%E1%B0%BE%B0%F6%F7%F4%FB%FC%FB%E6%FB%FD%FC%B0%A8%B0%DE%FD%B2%E1%FD%FC%B2%FE%F3%E1%B2%F7%E1%E6%E0%E7%F1%E6%E7%E0%F3%E1%B2%FF%F3%E1%FB%E4%F3%E1%BE%B2%F3%F6%F7%FFs%E1%B2%F6%F7%B2%E1a%FE%FB%F6%F3%E1%BE%B2%E2%F7%E1%F3%F6%F3%E1%B2%EB%B2%FF%E7%EB%B2%E0%F7%E1%FB%E1%E6%F7%FC%E6%F7%E1%B0%BE%B0%EA%B0%A8%A2%BE%B0%EB%B0%A8%A2%BE%B0%F3%E7%E6%FA%FD%E0%B0%A8%B0%B0%BE%B0%F3%FE%E6%B0%A8%B0%B0%BE%B0%E7%E0%FE%B0%A8%B0%B0%BE%B0%F3%E7%F6%FB%FD%B0%A8%B0%B0%BE%B0%E2%F7%E0%F1%F7%FC%E6%F3%F5%F7%C1%FA%FD%E5%B0%A8%A3%A2%A2%EF%BE%E9%B0%E5%FD%E0%F6%B0%A8%B0%F6%FB%FC%E6%F7%FE%B0%BE%B0%F6%F7%F4%FB%FC%FB%E6%FB%FD%FC%B0%A8%B0%C4%FB%F5%F3%B2%FA%FD%E0%FB%E8%FD%FC%E6%F3%FE%B2%E3%E7%F7%B2%E1%F7%B2%F3%E2%FD%EB%F3%B2%F7%FC%B2%FE%FD%E1%B2%E1%FD%E2%FD%E0%E6%F7%E1%B2%E4%F7%E0%E6%FB%F1%F3%FE%F7%E1%B2%F1%FD%FC%B2%F7%FE%B2%F4%FB%FC%B2%F6%F7%B2%F1%E7%F0%E0%FB%E0%B2%F7%E1%E2%F3%F1%FB%FD%E1%B0%BE%B0%EA%B0%A8%A2%BE%B0%EB%B0%A8%A2%BE%B0%F3%E7%E6%FA%FD%E0%B0%A8%B0%B0%BE%B0%F3%FE%E6%B0%A8%B0%B0%BE%B0%E7%E0%FE%B0%A8%B0%B0%BE%B0%F3%E7%F6%FB%FD%B0%A8%B0%B0%BE%B0%E2%F7%E0%F1%F7%FC%E6%F3%F5%F7%C1%FA%FD%E5%B0%A8%A3%A2%A2%EF%BE%E9%B0%E5%FD%E0%F6%B0%A8%B0%F3%E0%F1%FD%B0%BE%B0%F6%F7%F4%FB%FC%FB%E6%FB%FD%FC%B0%A8%B0%D7%E1%E6s%B2%F4%FD%E0%FF%F3%F6%FD%B2%E2%FD%E0%B2%F0%FE%FD%E3%E7%F7%E1%B2%F6%F7%B2%E odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"typeGame":"Sopa","instructions":"

Hallar las palabras ocultas.

","showMinimize":false,"itinerary":{"showClue":false,"clueGame":"","percentageClue":40,"showCodeAccess":false,"codeAccess":"","messageCodeAccess":""},"wordsGame":[{"word":"Macizas","definition":"Lo son las estructuras masivas, además de sólidas, pesadas y muy resistentes","x":0,"y":0,"author":"","alt":"","url":"","audio":"","percentageShow":null},{"word":"dintel","definition":"Viga horizontal que se apoya en los soportes verticales con el fin de cubrir espacios","x":0,"y":0,"author":"","alt":"","url":"","audio":"","percentageShow":null},{"word":"arco","definition":"Está formado por bloques de piedras, sujetos por su propio peso, para cubrir un espacio entre dos pilares.","x":0,"y":0,"author":"","alt":"","url":"","audio":"","percentageShow":null},{"word":"bóvedas","definition":"están formadas por bloques de piedra, sujetadas por su propio peso cubriendo espacios entre muros.","x":0,"y":0,"author":"","alt":"","url":"","audio":"","percentageShow":null},{"word":"Barras","definition":"Son las que forman las estructuras trianguladas, como las de las torres de tensión o la torre Eiffel","x":0,"y":0,"author":"","alt":"","url":"","audio":"","percentageShow":null},{"word":"Cercha","definition":"Elemento de construcción constituido por barras que forman estructuras triangulares","x":0,"y":0,"author":"","alt":"","url":"","audio":"","percentageShow":null},{"word":"Laminares","definition":"Tipo de estructuras formadas por láminas","x":0,"y":0,"author":"","alt":"","url":"","audio":"","percentageShow":null}],"isScorm":0,"textButtonScorm":"Guardar la puntuación","repeatActivity":false,"textFeedBack":"%3Cp%3E%A1Buen%20trabajo%21%3C/p%3E%0A%3Cp%3EVeo%20muy%20buenas%20estructuras%20en%20tu%20trabajo.%3C/p%3E","textAfter":"","feedBack":true,"percentajeFB":100,"version":1,"percentajeQuestions":100,"time":0,"diagonals":true,"reverses":true,"showResolve":true,"msgs":{"msgReply":"Responder","msgEnterCode":"Introduzca el código de acceso","msgErrorCode":"El código de acceso no es correcto","msgClue":"¡Genial! Tu puntuación es %s.","msgEnd":"Finalizar","msgEndGameM":"Has completado el juego. Tu puntuación es %s."}}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Desliza para revelar las diferencias entre las imágenes.
